item.title: How I run autonomous coding agents from my phone with OpenAI Symphony + Linear | Alessio Fanelli (Kernel Labs)
item.description: Focus: OpenAI is covered in a new interview or podcast. The core topic is 'How I run autonomous coding agents from my phone with OpenAI Symphony + Linear | Alessio Fanelli (Kernel Labs)', useful for tracking executive views, AI strategy and product direction.

item.title: Automation Makes The World Cup Worse. But We Can’t Help Ourselves, Can We?
item.description: Focus: Advanced sensors and robot refs make the games more accurate and fair. But better? No, not at all.

item.title: How Open Models Are Driving AI Research
item.description: Focus: Every year, the International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) reveals where thousands of AI researchers have decided to put their work. This year’s accepted papers reveal a clear direction: open frontier models and open AI infrastructure have become foundational to how modern AI science

item.title: How Nations Are Deploying AI for Strategic Priorities
item.description: Focus: Nations have long invested in domestic infrastructure to advance their economies, protect and use their data, and take advantage of technology opportunities in areas such as transportation, communications, commerce, entertainment and healthcare. AI, the most important technology of our time,
